title: ocr_result.json -- OCR quality + cross-validation log v0.2
description: Per-document, per-page text extraction results, uncertain regions, and the P8 dual-path cross-validation outcome. Produced by document-pipeline's checkpoint 1. Propagation rule: if a later stage's evidence_reference quote overlaps an uncertain_region, that field is routed review_required: true. Only a per-document summary (ocr_quality, uncertain_region_count, cross_validation_status) is copied into document_manifest.json.

ocr_engine.description: OCR engine/extractor used. e.g. upstage_ocr, pdfplumber

vision_model_name.description: The vision-capable model used for P8's independent blind read (harness-guardrails P8). Its output is never shown the OCR text before reading -- see cross_validation per page.

uncertain_confidence_threshold.description: Blocks below this confidence are recorded as uncertain_region. Not fixed in the schema since confidence distributions vary by engine -- record whatever value was actually used for this run.

extraction_method.description: Whether text came from a PDF's embedded text layer or image OCR. If embedded_text, confidence-related fields may be null.

encoding_detected.description: Detected encoding for text-file inputs. Some source-cases files use CP949 -- record it.

ocr_status.description: Kept in sync with document_manifest.json's ocr_status for this document.

pages.description: Per-page results. May be empty if ocr_status is failed.

document_mean_confidence.description: Mean of per-page mean_confidence. null for embedded_text documents.

ocr_quality.description: Document-level quality summary, mirrored in document_manifest.json. Derivation (e.g. uncertain-region ratio, presence of failed pages) is an implementation detail but must stay consistent across runs; a majority of 'low' documents is a No-Go signal to check.

cross_validation_status.description: Document-level rollup of the per-page cross_validation results below. 'disagreed_pending_review' on any page means the whole document is blocked from downstream use per harness-guardrails P8 until a human resolves it.

text_path.description: Path to this page's extracted text. data/processed/CASE_XXX/DOC_XXX/page_NNN.md

mean_confidence.description: Mean confidence for this page. null if embedded_text.

uncertain_regions.description: Blocks below threshold. Required -- omission is not allowed; an empty array means 'checked, none found', distinct from 'not checked'.

uncertain_region.description: One uncertain region. Offsets are character positions (0-based, end exclusive) within this page's text_path file. Used by later stages to check whether a quoted evidence_reference overlaps an uncertain region.

text_as_read.description: The engine's raw reading, verbatim (may be a misread).

note.description: Optional. e.g. stamp/handwriting overlap, table boundary cut off.

cross_validation_result.description: P8's dual-path cross-validation for this page: the OCR engine's text (above) vs. a vision-capable model reading the same raw page blind, without seeing the OCR output. Diffed for material-content agreement (same names/dates/numbers/diagnoses present) -- not verbatim match.

vision_model_reading.description: The vision model's independent transcription/content summary of this page, produced before it ever saw the OCR text.

disagreement_details.description: Populated only when agreement is 'disagreed' -- what specifically differs between the two readings.
